name: Ric Grenell
subject: Announcement:
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

---
Peter,
---
I recently spoke with President Trump on Newsmax.
---
_He said that the Deep State is still on a mission to take down him, along with anyone who supported his Administration, myself included._
---
But no matter what, we will never stop fighting to secure our elections.
---
_That 's why I just launched a new initiative aimed at carrying out President Trump's mission to secure our elections in California \-- and I'm inviting you to become a Founding Member._
---
[**Please make a contribution to become a Founding Member of Fix California -- as we fight to secure our elections in California.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853130:JrzWAWlNZ:m:1:3253819041:02BDF05ADB666FA433D69C4357DEBFF2:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853130:JrzWAWlNZ:m:1:3253819041:02BDF05ADB666FA433D69C4357DEBFF2:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853131:JrzWAWlNZ:m:1:3253819041:02BDF05ADB666FA433D69C4357DEBFF2:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853132:JrzWAWlNZ:m:1:3253819041:02BDF05ADB666FA433D69C4357DEBFF2:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853133:JrzWAWlNZ:m:1:3253819041:02BDF05ADB666FA433D69C4357DEBFF2:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853134:JrzWAWlNZ:m:1:3253819041:02BDF05ADB666FA433D69C4357DEBFF2:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853135:JrzWAWlNZ:m:1:3253819041:02BDF05ADB666FA433D69C4357DEBFF2:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853130:JrzWAWlNZ:m:1:3253819041:02BDF05ADB666FA433D69C4357DEBFF2:r)**
---
Liberal corporations and the White House are joining forces to try and shut down any and all election integrity reforms.
---
_But the more the Left tries to shut us down, the more we need to fight back._
---
The fight to secure our elections must be a nationwide effort -- and there's no better place to begin than in Pelosi's backyard of California.
---
Now I'm hoping you'll join me in the fight to protect the integrity of our elections.
---
[**Please make a contribution to become a Founding Member of Fix California -- as we fight to secure our elections in California.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853130:JrzWAWlNZ:m:1:3253819041:02BDF05ADB666FA433D69C4357DEBFF2:r)

name: Mark, House Conservatives HQ
subject: We didn’t – couldn’t – do this for anyone else, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I was told you were a top Trump Patriot committed to defending his legacy from Pelosi and her Radical Mob, but you failed to step up

Hey Peter, here at House Republicans HQ, it's my job to make sure we have the required resources to fight back against the Left's attacks, flip the FIVE SEATS we need to reclaim the House Majority, and FIRE Pelosi.

**Last night the FEC end-of-quarter deadline - our most important deadline yet - passed. And we fell disastrously short.** I wish I had better news, Peter, but [**unless every grassroots patriot who reads this steps up and chips in $20.22 IN THE NEXT HOUR to close the gap the Democrats will trample us in top-targeted, key races that will determine who controls the House Majority.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

[**CHIP IN $20.22**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

_Kevin McCarthy.
Steve Scalise.
Elise Stefanik.
Dan Crenshaw.
VP Mike Pence.
Donald Trump Jr._

Every single one of these top conservative patriots reached out to ask for your support before our critical deadline. We told you victory was on the line. **Despite our please, you didn 't step up to STOP the Left's Socialist Agenda. [Was this a mistake?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)**

[**YES, COUNT ME IN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

[**NO, I'M A SOCIALIST**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

Peter, I'm deeply disappointed. I was told you were a top Trump Patriot committed to defending his legacy from Pelosi and her Radical Mob, but you failed to step up when we needed you most. Trump's America First legacy is on the line - if we fail to take back the House, it'll be gone for good.

**After all that Donald Trump and his allies in Congress have done for you, it 's your turn to fight for them. [Even $1 goes a long way to stopping the Left in their tracks....](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)**

[**CHIP IN $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853220:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

[**CHIP IN $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853221:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

[**CHIP IN $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

[**CHIP IN $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

[**ANY AMOUNT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

This deadline was critical. Reaching our goal was critical - and we FAILED. Peter, we can't afford to let the Left outraise AGAIN so we have no choice...

**[If 109,918 patriots give whatever they can- $5, $10, even just $1 - IN THE NEXT 1 HOUR we'll have a fighting chance. It's dire so we're only reaching out to TOP Trump Patriots.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r) That means the fate of the House Majority is going to come down to what you do in this moment.**

Please help set the record straight. We've extended the deadline ONLY FOR YOU and TOP Patriots, Peter. Nobody else gets this kind of treatment.

[**Unless you 've given up on Trump and now support Nancy Pelosi, please step up! The next 1 HOUR will determine whether we WIN or LOSE it all.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853219:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

Sincerely,

Mark
House Republicans HQ

Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57853222:JFGzyWlNS:m:1:3253819041:E733847117347A8B83624147A6B445BD:r)

That means we’re going to be able to get our ads up on the air! We are honored to have such amazing grassroots supporters standing with us as we fight to unite the country and strengthen our Democratic power in Washington. Without you, we couldn’t air any ads to support the Biden agenda. So, thank you. And as we work to unite the country, it’s crucial that we listen to our grassroots supporters and determine exactly what priorities we need to highlight in our upcoming ad campaigns. **[We want to hear from you: what are your top priorities? Republican Senators in North Carolina, Pennsylvania, and Ohio have already announced they won’t be seeking reelection next year, so we have an incredible opportunity to save and expand our majority.
Democrats cannot afford to grow complacent, we must continue fighting back with everything we’ve got — and we’re going to need the resources to do it.
Grassroots donations from emails like this help fund a huge portion of our TV and digital programs. We wouldn’t have been able to win Senate seats in Colorado, Arizona, and Georgia without contributions from supporters like you.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31777485/293716327/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210702_X_CUL_TY_X_ACT_US_all_all_TY_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzAzMDBjZi0zZGRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCu9ieyMZFdMUHhraS-dbSUKELEfpen5aElpLs1B0Ks=&emci=50a6b843-9cda-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=730300cf-3ddb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Hello — I want to take a moment simply to say thanks. There are lots of ways to get involved with this campaign — whether it’s volunteering, signing petitions, sharing your thoughts through our surveys, or pitching in with grassroots donations. Every single one of these actions helps keep our work rooted in New Mexico. Thank you. We’ve seen a lot of progress lately. We’ve acted on climate by passing the biggest bipartisan vote to cut greenhouse gases in more than a decade. New Mexico’s First Congressional District stayed blue thanks to the support of this grassroots campaign. And 62% of folks in New Mexico are fully vaccinated. But our work isn’t done yet. Together, we can make New Mexico a leader in clean energy, innovation, and opportunity. We can protect our public lands and wildlife, and grow our outdoor recreation economy. And we can keep our promise to our veterans, and ensure that every New Mexican has access to quality health care and a high-quality education. I know we can do it because this team has shown it time and time again. We are persistent and we never give up. Thank you again for all you do to support me and the important work at hand. — Martin | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31777499/293716358/-90495277?refcode=MTH_em_20210702_X_CUL_TY_X_ACT_US_all_all_TY_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzAzMDBjZi0zZGRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCu9ieyMZFdMUHhraS-dbSUKELEfpen5aElpLs1B0Ks=)

clean_body: Hello — I want to take a moment simply to say thanks. There are lots of ways to get involved with this campaign — whether it’s volunteering, signing petitions, sharing your thoughts through our surveys, or pitching in with grassroots donations. Every single one of these actions helps keep our work rooted in New Mexico. Thank you. We’ve seen a lot of progress lately. We’ve acted on climate by passing the biggest bipartisan vote to cut greenhouse gases in more than a decade. New Mexico’s First Congressional District stayed blue thanks to the support of this grassroots campaign. And 62% of folks in New Mexico are fully vaccinated. But our work isn’t done yet. Together, we can make New Mexico a leader in clean energy, innovation, and opportunity. We can protect our public lands and wildlife, and grow our outdoor recreation economy. And we can keep our promise to our veterans, and ensure that every New Mexican has access to quality health care and a high-quality education. I know we can do it because this team has shown it time and time again. We are persistent and we never give up. Thank you again for all you do to support me and the important work at hand. — Martin | = | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. subject: We proved our STRENGTH! 💪🏽💪🏽💪🏽

body:
We did it! We not only met our goal last month, but we also exceeded it! At a time when Republicans are looking for any sign of weakness, we proved our strength!

You truly are the wind beneath my wings. We’ve proven once again that when we come together, we can overcome anything.

But we cannot rest, we must continue to stand up and represent our values, believes, and pride in our democracy – we must continue to make our voices heard and prove our power.

Thank you, Peter, for being an integral part of this campaign team.

Contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenjuly21?refcode=070221

Together, #WeRepresent

Gwen Moore
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice

P.S. - Happy 4th of July! Even if you’ve received your COVID vaccination, please celebrate responsibly.

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31783076/293729664/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGVkZjcyZi00NmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki3AV1Ad-eySjXhvgL_SqAYHwvEZj9fiT-jydLknNDU=&emci=d80b00fd-44db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=04edf72f-46db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15759664)

| | I wanted to be the first person to reach out and welcome you to the team, Derek. The Democratic Party of Virginia is made up of some of the most committed and most fired-up people I’ve ever worked with, and we’re pumped to have you!

We had some great successes over the past few years:
* 2017: We **flipped 15 House seats** in the General Assembly -- Virginia’s largest electoral shift since 1899.
* 2018: We re-elected Senator Tim Kaine and **flipped 3 congressional districts** , sending three first-time Congresswomen -- Elaine Luria, Jennifer Wexton, and Abigail Spanberger -- to Washington.
* 2019: We ran the most aggressive coordinated campaign in the history of our Commonwealth -- flipping both chambers of the General Assembly and giving Democrats trifecta control of state government for the first time in over 25 years.
* 2020: **We sent Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House** in a resounding repudiation of Donald Trump. And we re-elected our entire Congressional delegation of Democrats and Senator Mark Warner -- all in the midst of a raging pandemic.

But the work doesn’t stop here. Virginia has elections _every year_ \-- and in 2021 the top positions of governor, lieutenant governor, and attorney general are all up for grabs. Unfortunately, Virginia also has a long history of electing governors from the party that just lost the White House. And you can bet the Republicans are going to fight their hardest to keep that trend alive.

I won’t lie: It’s going to be a lot of work, but I know we can get it done with you on our side.

Want to get more involved? **[Click here to find out how](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31783077/293729665/1877098619?emci=e16c7875-44de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15759664&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGVkZjcyZi00NmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki3AV1Ad-eySjXhvgL_SqAYHwvEZj9fiT-jydLknNDU=)** or follow us on **[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31783078/293729666/1000382931?emci=e16c7875-44de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15759664&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGVkZjcyZi00NmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki3AV1Ad-eySjXhvgL_SqAYHwvEZj9fiT-jydLknNDU=)** , **[Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31783079/293729667/-312611665?emci=e16c7875-44de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15759664&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGVkZjcyZi00NmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki3AV1Ad-eySjXhvgL_SqAYHwvEZj9fiT-jydLknNDU=)** , and **[Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31783080/293729668/-1492885852?emci=e16c7875-44de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15759664&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGVkZjcyZi00NmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki3AV1Ad-eySjXhvgL_SqAYHwvEZj9fiT-jydLknNDU=)** for all the latest news and updates from DPVA.

The Democratic Party of Virginia is made up of some of the most committed and most fired-up people I’ve ever worked with, and we’re pumped to have you! We had some great successes over the past few years: 2017: We flipped 15 House seats in the General Assembly -- Virginia’s largest electoral shift since 1899. 2018: We re-elected Senator Tim Kaine and flipped 3 congressional districts , sending three first-time Congresswomen -- Elaine Luria, Jennifer Wexton, and Abigail Spanberger -- to Washington. 2019: We ran the most aggressive coordinated campaign in the history of our Commonwealth -- flipping both chambers of the General Assembly and giving Democrats trifecta control of state government for the first time in over 25 years. 2020: We sent Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House in a resounding repudiation of Donald Trump. And we re-elected our entire Congressional delegation of Democrats and Senator Mark Warner -- all in the midst of a raging pandemic. But the work doesn’t stop here. Virginia has elections every year \-- and in 2021 the top positions of governor, lieutenant governor, and attorney general are all up for grabs. Unfortunately, Virginia also has a long history of electing governors from the party that just lost the White House. And you can bet the Republicans are going to fight their hardest to keep that trend alive. I won’t lie: It’s going to be a lot of work, but I know we can get it done with you on our side. Want to get more involved? = or follow us on = , = , and = for all the latest news and updates from DPVA. Looking forward to staying in touch, Andrew Whitley Executive Director | = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Thank you, President Biden
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I’m writing to express my gratitude to President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden for visiting the site of the Surfside tragedy yesterday.

President Biden’s compassion and unyielding support of the recovery efforts means everything right now. We should all be grateful for his empathy and swift response to this crisis.

Leaders from across the country and the world have stepped up in the wake of this unimaginable tragedy. Dozens of community organizations in Miami-Dade have contributed to the relief efforts, and you can support them by clicking here. [https://supportsurfside.org/]

As we prepare to celebrate the Fourth of July , I hope the past week--and in particular, the heroism of our first responders and emergency personnel--serves as a reminder that we are at our best when we stand together and support one another, even in the most difficult times.

Warmly,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Mike Collier
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
We did it, folks!

We hit our fundraising goal for our Texas Ethics Commission filing deadline. As a matter of fact, y’all greatly exceeded our team’s expectations for the quarter!

Thanks to folks like you coming together, we can now make some key investments in building our people-powered movement, expanding our team, and turning the dial up on our organizing efforts across the state.

We know that if we’re going to win, we’ll have to fight to earn every Texan’s vote in every county and bring solutions to the issues people care about most. This work will be critical to taking on Dan Patrick and his army of lobbyists, corporate donors, and super PACs.

We appreciate every single one of you for putting in the time and effort to create a state government that works for all Texans.

Together, we can deliver a new path forward for the people of Texas that will put more money into our schools, hospitals, and infrastructure, and bring good-paying union jobs to the Lone Star State.

And finally, we will hold Dan Patrick accountable for his massive failures that have left too many Texans struggling to get by.

From the bottom of my heart, thank y’all for being part of our movement.

— Mike Collier

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-email-july2021?refcode=mc-em210702-thankyou]
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States

**Peter, I know how much elections matter.**

I grew up in the West End of Louisville, and for years, I lived in the poorest zip code in the Commonwealth.

I’ve rationed my insulin to have money to feed my family.

I’ve lost people I love to gun violence.

**I’ve _lived_ the struggle other politicians just talk about,** but I’ve also seen the incredible kindness, strength, and resilience of our state.

**And the policies Rand Paul has fought for -- like tax cuts for the top 1% -- did nothing to help me or the people in my community.**

I’m running for Senate because I know our state deserves a real fighter -- _not someone who bows to Trump and his cronies._

But the National GOP knows just how much power this movement has, so they are already dumping dark money into this race.

**[I really need to prep early if we are going to take them on. Please, split a donation between me and the folks at VPP so we can fight Rand Paul, Mitch McConnell, and the radical GOP.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31784891/293737722/-340882161?amount=5&refcode=UD_20210702_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyY2Y0YzVkLTRhZGItZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0br-0KoNm2KjXqSAEJghoMVxhpMnaqH6B9mq4_3Zlf4=)**

I’ve rationed my insulin to have money to feed my family. I’ve lost people I love to gun violence. I’ve lived the struggle other politicians just talk about, but I’ve also seen the incredible kindness, strength, and resilience of our state. And the policies Rand Paul has fought for -- like tax cuts for the top 1% -- did nothing to help me or the people in my community. I’m running for Senate because I know our state deserves a real fighter -- not someone who bows to Trump and his cronies. But the National GOP knows just how much power this movement has, so they are already dumping dark money into this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Kentuckians show up for each other. Our leaders should show up for us, too. Thank you for being with me from the beginning. Let’s win this. \-- Charles = Charles Booker Candidate for Senate, KY | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 to receive fewer emails. to update your information. name: Greg Stanton
subject: Thank you--
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to reach out and **thank you** for your support during our end-of-quarter fundraising push. Reaching our goal was _really_ important in preparing us for the election next year, which was why you heard from me and my team so much.

---
**Because of your support and generosity, we were able to hit our goal! **

Every day, I'm grateful for the chance to fight for hardworking Arizonans across the state. It is the _honor of a lifetime_ , and I could not do it without folks like you by my side.

Thanks for the support!

\-- _Greg_

## GET OUT THE GRILL AND SET UP THE FIREWORKS:
_It’s almost Independence Day — and no, we don’t mean the Will Smith movie._ _Celebrate our nation’s birthday with some live trainings that are sure to make your campaign sparkle (just without the fire hazard)._ 💥 _
__
__And maybe with the Will Smith movie too, we won’t judge.🛸_

* * *

[**How to Build a Political Campaign Field Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZ3JhZnFzdWFnYzhtNjloN2YydzciLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vY3A0WktaY2VHYy9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzAyMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

**Wednesday, July 7, 1pm ET**
Knowing when, how, and what office to run for isn’t easy. _That’s why we’re here!_ On Wednesday, we’ll help you decide if you want to run as well as how to get started.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZ3JhZnFzdWFnYzhtNjloN2YydzciLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vUTFBb0VBeUNTbi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzAyMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

**Thursday, July 8, 1pm ET****
****
**You need a lot of votes to win an election. But how many _exactly?_ Thursday’s training will help you calculate the actual number of votes you need to be victorious on election day and how to create winning strategies to get there.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZ3JhZnFzdWFnYzhtNjloN2YydzciLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vcEJQMlFHUEhqUi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzAyMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

* * *

**Friday, July 9, 1pm ET****
****
**We know, persuading voters in a**red district** sounds like a daunting task. But it can (and should) be done! Friday’s training will walk you through how, where, and why to do it.

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZ3JhZnFzdWFnYzhtNjloN2YydzciLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vZTdpUUQyM0FNdi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNzAyMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

From creating a unique digital brand to keeping a consistent campaign message, our latest article delves into how your campaign can use digital strategies to stand out from the pack. Peter,

On Wednesday, we faced our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. This deadline marked the first time our fundraising numbers will be made public since our first Republican opponent entered the race, so it was crucial we reached our online goal.

Well, this team stepped up in a huge way, and because of your support, **we hit our fundraising goal!**

Thank you,

Kim

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Thank you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I can promise you this: As long as I have your support, I won’t stop fighting for you.
#

Hey there,
After Wednesday’s deadline, I wanted to pause for a moment and say thank you for all of the support you’ve given my team and me over these past three months.
Time and time again, you’ve shown up for us, and I can’t tell you how grateful I am. Even when the going got tough, we bounced right back.
We launched this campaign with one goal in mind, friend: **To build a movement that strives for equity and justice for all, powered by working people.**
And make no mistake. The thousands of individuals who have chipped in $25, $10, $5, or even just $1 are the reason we’re still here.
I’m running for Senate because I’m fed up with politicians selling out poor and working-class families across this country just for a check.
I’ve been there, and I know what it means to be ignored by a government that was supposed to work for us.
**So, friend, I can promise you this: As long as I have your support, I won’t stop fighting for you.**
Thank you, again, for everything.
Onwards,
Malcolm

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31786602/293745789/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk131-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTcxMDY0NC00ZmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXyvFrln38HLggNeekrJG3puvHoLBz46NLbREk4GNtA=)

>From the bottom of my heart, friend – _thank you_. **After I let you know that we fell short of our critical end-of-quarter goal, this grassroots team stepped up like never before to close our fundraising gap, just before the midnight cutoff.**
This is huge, and it's not just because of the money. Hitting this goal means we can put our focus back where it's needed most: on the work of talking to voters, winning this race, flipping Arizona blue and finally ridding our state of the failed Republican leadership that's held us back from our potential – from our promise.
Together, I know our movement can lead Arizona in making big, inclusive change – and it starts with moments like this one, when the stakes are high and we rise to meet them.
Thank you again for always being there when it matters most. More to come!
– Marco
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
%%Firstname(Friend)%%, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31786603/293745790/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk131-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTcxMDY0NC00ZmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXyvFrln38HLggNeekrJG3puvHoLBz46NLbREk4GNtA=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31786604/293745791/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk131-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTcxMDY0NC00ZmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXyvFrln38HLggNeekrJG3puvHoLBz46NLbREk4GNtA=)

name: Anna Kelly - Communications Director
subject: Ron Kind skips work to eat ice cream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58367703:sLWeRcdVN:m:1:2068296031:3EDFBC75A98CC3A8F59FCF85D30329C7:r)
Hi Friend,

Did you hear about the latest controversy on Ron Kind? While millions of Wisconsinites went to work on Tuesday, **Ron Kind played hooky from his responsibilities in Washington -- claiming that he had to miss House votes because of COVID when ****he was actually getting ice cream with Joe Biden.**
****
[_**Friend, we need to send Ron Kind packing once and for all.**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58367703:sLWeRcdVN:m:1:2068296031:3EDFBC75A98CC3A8F59FCF85D30329C7:r)
Whether he's claiming to be a moderate while supporting Nancy Pelosi for Speaker or claiming a health emergency is causing his absence on the House floor when the entire world knows he's at a campaign stop with Joe Biden, Ron Kind has become so comfortable that he thinks that he can lie to his constituents and they won't notice.
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58367703:sLWeRcdVN:m:1:2068296031:3EDFBC75A98CC3A8F59FCF85D30329C7:r)
Your support will help us get a head start on our efforts to get one step closer to a Republican House majority by ending Ron Kind's career in Congress. **This race will be a game of inches, and every bit of help could mean the difference.**

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said, Peter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57856871:JLSwIWlsN:m:1:3253819041:BE527FF6DC39C269A58F739A46F6B1BD:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57856871:JLSwIWlsN:m:1:3253819041:BE527FF6DC39C269A58F739A46F6B1BD:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. [**But there 's something you can do.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57856871:JLSwIWlsN:m:1:3253819041:BE527FF6DC39C269A58F739A46F6B1BD:r) That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. [**Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57856871:JLSwIWlsN:m:1:3253819041:BE527FF6DC39C269A58F739A46F6B1BD:r) And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57856871:JLSwIWlsN:m:1:3253819041:BE527FF6DC39C269A58F739A46F6B1BD:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57856871:JLSwIWlsN:m:1:3253819041:BE527FF6DC39C269A58F739A46F6B1BD:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57856871:JLSwIWlsN:m:1:3253819041:BE527FF6DC39C269A58F739A46F6B1BD:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I just wanted to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Hey Peter! I wanted to reach out before the holiday weekend to personally thank you for your generous support. With our first end-of-quarter deadline behind us, we're in a strong position to defeat Ron Johnson, flip this seat, and expand our Senate majority.

While I wish I could personally thank everyone who chipped in, I am very glad for the grassroots donors that I did get a chance to talk to on the phone.

I also got a look at who chipped in online -- like Harvey from Juneau, Rachel from La Crosse, William from Shell Lake, Cherie from Green Bay, Kris from Rhinelander, David from Milwaukee, Joe from Spooner, Dennis from Eau Claire, and so many more.

Ours is a grassroots campaign, through and through. Over the past few weeks alone, we’ve met folks at coffee shops, breweries, picnics -- you name it. We are building a movement for all of Wisconsin with support from every corner of our beautiful state.

Now, thanks to you, our campaign has the resources to keep criss-crossing the state and talking with Wisconsinites about the kitchen table issues that matter most to their families. And that’s important because I refuse to take a dime of corporate PAC money.

Whether you chipped in, volunteered your time, shared our posts on social media, or even forwarded these emails to your friends and family, I’m so grateful for all that you’ve done for our campaign.

I'll be in touch about how you can continue to support our campaign, but for now, I’ll leave you with this: **Thank you.** I can’t imagine being on this journey without you.

Forward,

Sarah Godlewski

| This campaign is funded by grassroots donors, not corporate PACs. If you can, please consider making a small contribution to support our people-powered movement to defeat Ron Johnson.

subject: Let’s tell Congress: It’s time to protect voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; https://nextgenamerica
body:
Voting rights are under attack, and we need your help.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31789215/293757099/-1668467654?refcode=em_fr_210702s1_n_ctr_fl_8_ng_testa_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWM3Y2JmMy01NmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9AK3n7AzLoMEAGtw98Cgjw_38ScEg-aI3aaunDmL4U=) Friend, **Just last week, Attorney General Merrick Garland announced the Justice Department is suing Georgia over its new voting restrictions that unfairly deny and limit the rights of Black voters.** Georgia has been ground zero for voter suppression tactics since the Jim Crow era. From closing polling places in primarily Black areas to aggressive purging of voter rolls, these newest voting restrictions are just another tactic from the Republican voter-suppression playbook. Republican-held state legislatures are testing the boundaries of the Voting Rights Act in an attempt to stay in power — so we must push Congress _to act!_ **It’s time Congress ends the filibuster** , a Jim Crow-era procedural tool that prevents the Senate from passing common-sense legislation with a simple majority, **and passes S. 1, the For the People Act.** Our grassroots supporters have already taken direct action to push Congress to protect our voting rights, but we can’t let up the pressure now! [**_Will you help NextGen continue fighting voter suppression and other efforts to mobilize the #youthvote across the country by donating $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31789218/293757102/-1668467654?refcode=em_fr_210702s1_n_ctr_fl_8_ng_testa_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWM3Y2JmMy01NmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9AK3n7AzLoMEAGtw98Cgjw_38ScEg-aI3aaunDmL4U=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31789222/293757106/-1668467654?refcode=em_fr_210702s1_n_ctr_fl_8_ng_testa_EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWM3Y2JmMy01NmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9AK3n7AzLoMEAGtw98Cgjw_38ScEg-aI3aaunDmL4U=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Happy Independence Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
There’s a hilarious attempt at gaslighting coming from the White House over the last few days. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470626?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Happy Independence Day!**_ There’s a hilarious attempt at gaslighting coming from the White House over the last few days. Obviously, they looked at some disastrous poll numbers and now President Biden’s handlers are trying to convince you that the Republican Party that wants to “defund the police.” Shockingly, the national media “fact checkers” are nowhere to be found on this blatant lie. Pelosi, Schumer, AOC, The Squad, and even Joe Biden himself all supported the defund the police movement last year. Meanwhile, your Republican Party has consistently stood by law enforcement, especially when dangerous Democrat rhetoric made our men and women in blue targets of increased violence. In Indiana, under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, we unanimously passed a law enforcement bill that invests in training, police labs, and recruitment efforts and our new state budget supplies body cameras to all law enforcement agencies in the state. You simply can’t trust what is coming from Joe Biden’s handlers these days.

Let’s move on to a happier topic. It’s Independence Day weekend, a perfect time to take stock of the brilliance of our founders and our ongoing work to form a more perfect union. I’m looking forward to spending this weekend with family and friends and reflecting on all we have to be grateful for as Americans. We at the Indiana Republican Party hope you enjoy your extended holiday weekend.

Thanks Kyle

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer with Clinton County Chairman Jim Moyer and outgoing Vice Chair Linda Brammell. Kyle presented Linda with a Chairman’s Award for her years of service and support to the party._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Moving Indiana Forward_** **Governor Holcomb** visited Whitestown to take part in cutting the ribbon for the new Little League Central Region Headquarters on Saturday. This new facility will hold tournaments for Little League softball and baseball events, including the Central Region, Great Lakes and Midwest Region tournaments.

On Tuesday, **Governor Holcomb **joined the Warrick County Chamber of Commerce at their annual luncheon to discuss READI and enhancing infrastructure.

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb cutting the ribbon for the Little League complex with members from Hendricks Regional Health.

**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb speaking at the Warrick County Chamber of Commerce Annual Member Luncheon._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Lugar Series Applications**_ Applications for the 32nd Class of the Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series are now available! The Lugar Series is a political leadership development program dedicated to increasing the number of Republican women in local, state and federal elective and appointive office. The application period opened on June 1 and closes on August 1, 2021. Information about the application can be found at [lugarseries.com/apply/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0ea0c4ba05&e=1acd9bb3d6) or by contacting [lugarseries@gmail.com](mailto:lugarseries@gmail.com).
---
|
---
| _**Gov. Holcomb Statement on Former First Lady Pat Whitcomb**_ Governor Eric J. Holcomb offered the following statement regarding the passing of former First Lady Pat Whitcomb.
_**“Pat Whitcomb served Hoosiers during her time as First Lady with honor and grace. She loved to travel and made it a point to visit all 92 counties in Indiana, twice. I loved that she learned how to greet people in many different languages so she could communicate with the world as she loved meeting new people from all corners always defining our signature Hoosier Hospitality. Janet and I extend our condolences to the Whitcomb family.” -Governor Holcomb**_
---
|
---
|
---
| _**RNC Spokesman at Diversity Series**_ Republican National Committee spokesperson [Paris Dennard visited with the inaugural](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c10fcc9885&e=1acd9bb3d6) class of our Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. Thank you Paris, for your leadership with our party or for spending time with our class!

Paris wrote about his experience in Indiana in this op-ed: [https://caro.news/people-are-flocking-to-the-republican-party/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c17aa1139a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Gov. Holcomb Opposes 'Court Packing'**_ Governor Holcomb joined 19 other Republican governors to issue a joint letter to President Joe Biden opposing any efforts to pack the U.S. Supreme Court. Court packing “would be unprecedented, unproductive, and unpredictable,” their letter read. You can read the entire text of the letter signed by Governor Holcomb here: [https://www.rga.org/republican-governors-oppose-bidens-partisan-efforts-pack-court/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0d372ce085&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel Launches "Real America" Podcast**_ RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel launched her new podcast, “Real America.” and will be traveling the country sharing stories from outside the beltway, highlighting Republican leaders around the country and how Republican policies have improved Americans’ lives. Chairwoman McDaniel is offering the platform for Republican leaders to share their successes and for listeners to hear real stories from the exciting, leading voices in our Party.
_**“America is an amazing country filled with wonderful people who do incredible things, but too often the media and liberal politicians ignore big parts of our nation and the people who make it work. So I'm thrilled to speak with these amazing leaders and policymakers in our party who solve real problems every day, and help spread their message far and wide.” -Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel**_
Chairwoman McDaniel's Podcast is available on Spotify, Appple Podcasts, or wherever podcasts are available. [Click here to listen](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7cbc57d206&e=1acd9bb3d6).

clean_body: There’s a hilarious attempt at gaslighting coming from the White House over the last few days. | | | | | | | | Happy Independence Day! There’s a hilarious attempt at gaslighting coming from the White House over the last few days. Obviously, they looked at some disastrous poll numbers and now President Biden’s handlers are trying to convince you that the Republican Party that wants to “defund the police.” Shockingly, the national media “fact checkers” are nowhere to be found on this blatant lie. Pelosi, Schumer, AOC, The Squad, and even Joe Biden himself all supported the defund the police movement last year. Meanwhile, your Republican Party has consistently stood by law enforcement, especially when dangerous Democrat rhetoric made our men and women in blue targets of increased violence. In Indiana, under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, we unanimously passed a law enforcement bill that invests in training, police labs, and recruitment efforts and our new state budget supplies body cameras to all law enforcement agencies in the state. You simply can’t trust what is coming from Joe Biden’s handlers these days. Let’s move on to a happier topic. It’s Independence Day weekend, a perfect time to take stock of the brilliance of our founders and our ongoing work to form a more perfect union. I’m looking forward to spending this weekend with family and friends and reflecting on all we have to be grateful for as Americans. We at the Indiana Republican Party hope you enjoy your extended holiday weekend. Thanks Kyle Photo: Chairman Hupfer with Clinton County Chairman Jim Moyer and outgoing Vice Chair Linda Brammell. body:
Let’s take back the 7th. | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=289663688b&e=ae0ea222da)

| | Friend,

It has been my life goal to help people find freedom around the world.

>From being raised by Air Force veterans, becoming a high-school teacher, starting the Congressional International Religious Freedom Caucus, to founding Hardwired Global, and now my current mission.

My passion for service, freedom, and work with people worldwide has led me here.
---
| [I AM RUNNING FOR VIRGINIA’S 7TH CONGRESSIONAL SEAT](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=30abca7469&e=ae0ea222da "I AM RUNNING FOR VIRGINIA’S 7TH CONGRESSIONAL SEAT")
---
| As a single mother and business owner, I know what hard work looks like. And here’s what WE will be working towards:
* Protecting the Sanctity of Life
* Ensuring our Religious Freedom
* Opposing “Cancel Culture”
* Stopping Critical Race Theory and Promoting School Choice
* Reforming the System for our Veterans
* Defending the Second Amendment
* Securing our Election

---
| [CONTRIBUTE TOWARDS THE RAMIREZ CAMPAIGN](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=688aa2bcbc&e=ae0ea222da "CONTRIBUTE TOWARDS THE RAMIREZ CAMPAIGN")
---
| This will be an uphill battle, but I know that together we can win this! No longer can we stand by as Spanberger continues to hurt the people of Virginia’s 7th congressional district.

Let’s win this together,

[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=3b4bd40d88&e=ae0ea222da)
Tina Ramirez
Republican Candidate
Virginia’s 7th Congressional District

They've also, by extension, given GOP legislatures across the country the greenlight to continue their assault on voting rights. **Stacey knows that we will only continue to see these attacks on our democracy unless we do something about them NOW. We've already joined her fight \-- now we're hoping you will too.** | **[DONATE TO JOIN STACEY ABRAMS' FIGHT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31790766/293762335/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210702_GEN_FDR_E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjOTI1ZDI1LTViZGItZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZOxuEf8o57ZEPYX1jcpac2stDlpnNvUo1Exa15KVKa8=)**

body:
---
| | Friend,

I am so grateful for your commitment to our people-powered, progressive campaign. As somebody who doesn’t come from money, it means a lot. **Thanks to your support, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!**

We are working hard to deliver Wisconsin for all Wisconsinites, not just the wealthy and corporations, and with your support, we can get our message out to every corner of the state. With you by my side, we will bring our progressive values to the Senate — I am ready to fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, taxing the rich, empowering the working class, and so much more.

Now, as we move into the holiday weekend, I hope we can all take the time to celebrate the anniversary of our country’s freedom and honor those that have sacrificed for us. But, we also must recognize those that are still fighting against injustice to achieve full freedom.

I hope you have a fun and safe holiday with your loved ones.

Thank you for being a part of our team,

Tom

name: Candace Owens
subject: ✍️ [Petition] BAN anti-American athletes from Olympics >>
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57857308:JxTovWljN:m:1:3253819041:91CAB3C142EA401A1C7CC236DD70E807:r)
---
| Peter,
---
| Over the weekend, American athlete **Gwen Berry _turned her back_ on the American flag and National Anthem** after winning a spot to represent Team USA at the Summer Olympics. **[I need you to sign our petition](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57857308:JxTovWljN:m:1:3253819041:91CAB3C142EA401A1C7CC236DD70E807:r "I need you to sign our petition")** **DEMANDING** the U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee: **[BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this summer.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57857308:JxTovWljN:m:1:3253819041:91CAB3C142EA401A1C7CC236DD70E807:r "BAN Gwen Berry and ANY anti-American athlete from Team USA at the Tokyo Olympics this
summer.")**
---
| | | [SIGN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57857308:JxTovWljN:m:1:3253819041:91CAB3C142EA401A1C7CC236DD70E807:r)
---
| After winning 3rd place _and_ a spot at the Olympics during the U.S. Track and Field Trials, **Gwen literally _turned away_ from the American flag** as "The Star-Spangled Banner" played. She then draped herself in a shirt that said "activist athlete." Later, she said, "**The anthem doesn't speak for me. It never has.''** POOR OPPRESSED GWEN, having to _suffer through the National Anthem_ while competing for a spot _on Team USA._ Newsflash, Gwen: representing the USA at the Olympics is a _privilege_. **If you don 't like this country, you don't DESERVE to represent us on the world stage.** **[Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57857308:JxTovWljN:m:1:3253819041:91CAB3C142EA401A1C7CC236DD70E807:r "Sign the petition if you agree: NO anti-American athletes on Team USA.")**
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57857308:JxTovWljN:m:1:3253819041:91CAB3C142EA401A1C7CC236DD70E807:r)
---
| Thanks,

Candace
---

As an organizer and a minister, my work has always been rooted in showing up and meeting people where they are, listening to what matters most to them, finding common ground and then translating that into action.
And that’s exactly how we’re going to build this campaign -- on the pillars of empathy, hope and love, and with a lot of grit and hard work.
**I’ve dedicated my life to making the South a home for everyone, and I’ve won office here when few people thought I had a chance -- and then got reelected by a double-digit margin. **
When my wife Meghann and I launched the Campaign for Southern Equality with an incredible team of community members, there was a deep skepticism that this effort could ever work. But we knew that people across the South -- especially in small towns and rural communities -- were ready to organize in new ways. So we ignored the skeptics and got to work organizing fellow LGBTQ+ couples to challenge marriage discrimination by showing up all over the Deep South.
We stood with loving couples as they requested a marriage license and were denied, and I will never forget the courage and hope it took for them, many of whom were coming out publicly for the first time. And I’ll never forget one couple in particular: two men who gave each other one last glance before walking down the street of their hometown holding hands, feeling their community’s eyes on them. It was the first time they had ever shown this kind of affection in public.
When I overcame the odds and was elected County Commissioner, I started a coffee hour along with another Commissioner, where anyone could bring us their concerns. At the first coffee hour, a couple came up to us and looked us both in the eyes and said, "Our daughter overdosed two days ago. What are you going to do?” I saw their pain, and in their voices I heard both their grief and their determination to make sure other families didn’t have to lose a child. So we got to work, and I helped build a coalition -- including three Republicans -- to unanimously pass opioid addiction initiatives 7-0.
My faith teaches me to find the stranger in the room and welcome them. To hold firmly to my values of love and empathy, understand where each person is coming from, and then forge solutions that lift us all up.
Every person’s story is particular and personal, but you also hear familiar refrains. How affordable childcare would make such a difference for a working mom. How more treatment programs for opioid addiction would help a beloved son start rebuilding his life. How local jobs that pay real salaries and offer benefits and opportunities for advancement would make it possible for a family to buy their first home.
My Republican opponent Madison Cawthorn spent weeks spreading conspiracy theories before firing up the mob on January 6th and voting to overturn the election -- even after the attack on our Capitol. Now, he believes he can win re-election with more hateful rhetoric, empty promises, and shameless self-promotion. If her name sounds familiar, it’s because she ran against Susan for this same seat in 2020, when we won one of the most competitive races in the country by just over 3.5%. We beat her once, and we know we can do it again —= | = Lisa Scheller never stopped running for this seat, and has been fundraising for this all year. In the first quarter alone, she dumped $500,000 of her personal wealth into her campaign, and we are awaiting Q2 finance reports to see whether she tops that. She has the financial ability to do that in every quarter of this campaign cycle. Scheller also was endorsed by 7 out of the 8 Pennsylvania Republicans in Congress, which means that she will have the full force of the NRCC behind her. She also has the support of GOP dark money groups that have already been airing attack ads against Susan. Susan doesn’t take any corporate PAC money. Peter,

I wanted to send a quick note to thank you so much for your continued support of my campaign for Congress.

Knowing that I have you on my team means so much to me. **Every person on Team Christy represents someone who believes in kind, compassionate leadership in Congress.**

Together, we are working to achieve progress -- and to vote out someone focused on road blocking legislation and stoking partisan divides.

Because of your support, we're going to post great numbers on our FEC filing report. We're showing our district, our state, and our country the powerful movement we are building to hold onto the Democratic House majority and flip CA-25 from red to blue.

**So, once again, I must thank you, friend.**

I hope you have a safe, festive, and fun Fourth of July weekend. Be careful in the heat and around fireworks (_can you tell I'm a mom?_).

\-- Christy

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: All of my gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
This incredible grassroots movement blew our end-of-quarter fundraising goal out of the water. And because of your continued generous support, we’re in a stronger position than ever in our fight to keep Washington state -- and the U.S. Senate -- in Democratic hands in 2022 beyond.
#
We did it, Peter!
This incredible grassroots movement blew our end-of-quarter fundraising goal out of the water. And because of your continued generous support, we’re in a stronger position than ever in our fight to keep Washington state -- and the U.S. Senate -- in Democratic hands in 2022 beyond.
This team steps up to the plate again and again, so I just wanted to reach out and say thank you. Supporters like you, and your commitment to building a better future for us all, are the reason I’m so optimistic about accomplishing the work ahead.
Thank you for all that you do,
Patty

She went to El Paso! | RESPONSE REQUESTED Who do you trust to secure the border? | | We can’t let Lying Kamala Harris paper-over her history of ignoring the border, Peter. HERE IS THE TRUTH: If you want to get the Border back under control, you need to elect America First Republicans. Please, Peter... let us know if you agree! | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: A quick note to say... Thank You!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Because of you and other generous conservatives around the nation who made a gift to my campaign, we reached our critical 2nd Quarter fundraising goal I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=956e8e65cecb4129b66ee9707428b459&_e=3Fja4YJyPRA7j8_orx8ZWM5-engIR4KKw9h-GJlqlhK9LDkyEw3qmXqlbI-xw2q9lmELEJ7MwqiERN2iwuVlwB1sKSE0wymdOxtPIN2aUBEiH84692V3cJcY6t8rCi0-5nzCOHXFoFYfVtseYXM5sJCM7e27knXAd1Vpm7LkhVKJvhri8FfYTHuLfH0gU4CQfBCL3a1eU9_b_Rw4hx1P_xojLJ7lFEBmAza51WJY8FL2nMa39Lm2Zjcx5GU8zAwDV5iCL5UucWTyXZFqgcnXT9oVS9aEJITovhQNr713tnPd45DZSLkfxxw_4i8PtRFY5le6Eqr3OfmR_fFNI9zrK0uR6y-ITR5iQFvtpbHTJdfA7GltGJmj2wBrHvNqxGwiX-kw-jx9HIIH7KvCJVU4GTtXoBQs9L6cRpZj7lVd0_ki2NXds7nVNOmvy9PoQEI0Acr1iYiuBLk9178uYhDkuQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

Before celebrations begin this weekend in observance of the 4th of July, I want to say thank you for your support in June. **Because of you and other generous conservatives around the nation who made a gift to my campaign, we reached our critical 2nd Quarter fundraising goal!**

**Since I announced in May, more than 8,000 conservatives from across the country have made a gift to my campaign with the intention of sending a conservative to Congress who will represent our shared values.**

Because you put your faith in a 28-year-old conservative from Oregon and made an investment in taking back our country from far-left liberals like my opponent, _**we are steadily building a competitive grassroots campaign to take back the House.**_.

I look forward to continuing this fight, together.

Thank you very much,

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

[**DONATE TODAY -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=956e8e65cecb4129b66ee9707428b459&_e=3Fja4YJyPRA7j8_orx8ZWM5-engIR4KKw9h-GJlqlhK9LDkyEw3qmXqlbI-xw2q9lmELEJ7MwqiERN2iwuVlwB1sKSE0wymdOxtPIN2aUBEiH84692V3cJcY6t8rCi0-5nzCOHXFoFYfVtseYXM5sJCM7e27knXAd1Vpm7LkhVKJvhri8FfYTHuLfH0gU4CQfBCL3a1eU9_b_Rw4hx1P_xojLJ7lFEBmAza51WJY8FJ-0hDKV1ERecVTBnAaQu4SXuPMDK8gkWwjKXo8ByQeCHdaShiMvDszMiQceXwlUByeC4AjM0oAOGXrlx5F2rSTZ88XZzp0_fwweY-2-CCu4qH27kwtOOBjaANx3lB0wvNqtr7weaW9LargJvE0-b2VT8AbIGV3slb0Fr6YMJlqq9dVMUdXxnWWOuTymIwlW2O_1Zy3qOoXshEVyqJEgSlt71icSJB-5c3vR_SO8q6PDg%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations=2C=20Roza=20Calderon?=
subject: Luis Daniel Muñoz for Governor of Rhode Island!
body:
People Powered Progress for Rhode Island! 👊 | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1fb28abeb1&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
### **PEOPLE POWERED PROGRESS**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=6cf8885d31&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| **Future Generations is proud to endorse Luis Daniel Muñoz for Rhode Island Governor 2022! **His lived experiences as a medical doctor, organizer, father, and husband will devote him to enact real progress which includes free clinics, environmental justice, and equity, accountability, and transparency for many generations to follow. **Only Dr. Muñoz has the political courage to acknowledge the power of the people has always been greater than the people in power.** His dedication to Rhode Island, where he grew up as one of five children of a single mother, makes him the best advocate for all.

---
| _Luis Daniel knows the community that raised him. He believes that education and opportunity should be equitable and accessible. That we can make greater investments in initiatives that lift people out of poverty. He understands that fighting for environmental justice will require government transparency and accountability. And that in these uncertain times, one thing is certain: Healthcare is a human right._
[Will you join us in supporting PEOPLE POWERED PROGRESS for Rhode Island?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7daca2f02f&e=66979298f9)
---
| [DONATE TO LUIS DANIEL!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=a15a730165&e=66979298f9 "DONATE TO LUIS DANIEL!")
---
| | **“I'm truly honored to have received the endorsement of Future Generations! The group's commitment to secure a just and livable planet for generations to come is truly reflective of our collective mission. It is an honor to have their endorsement.** **As a community organizer, father, husband, and medical doctor, I've come to understand the power of lived experiences and how those experiences shape our values. At the intersection of struggle and hope, and the many people that gave form to my lived experience, I discovered the courage to push against inequitable systems. Working families and historically disenfranchised communities should be able to breathe clean air, shelter within a safe and affordable home, feed their families, access free healthcare, and thrive in this economy. ** **In Rhode Island, we're fighting for real programmatic progressive change. Environmental justice, livable wages, criminal justice reform, affordable and low-income housing, free and accessible healthcare, and education systems with equitable funding formulas. It's time to bring progressive change to a historically conservative blue state. It's time to bridge the catalyzing progressive movements across the nation and to show that we have the collective power to effect real progress, at every level.” - Luis Daniel Muñoz**
---
| [DONATE TO LUIS DANIEL!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b643374ce3&e=66979298f9 "DONATE TO LUIS DANIEL!")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **Join Luis Daniel this Independence Day Weekend of Action**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=91ee7f4c35&e=66979298f9)
---
| We've seen that given a great progressive candidate to vote for, we can build enthusiasm and we can win and WIN BIG! We have built a nationwide coalition with organizations like Our Revolution, Sunrise Movement, Youth Climate Strike, MoveOn, and Flip the West to build our progressive bench!

We can do the same for Luis Daniel and can continue to expand in some of the most critical races in Rhode Island.

We can only win with your support. [**Will you split a donation with Luis Daniel and Future Generations?**](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=fb124c5a47&e=66979298f9)
---
| [GIVE $7](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7f56474972&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $7")
---
| [GIVE $20.22](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=099e9b3bf5&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $20.22")
---

name: Karen Bass
subject: One final update on our FEC end-of-quarter goal...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hey there,

I just got off the phone with my finance team, and I have great news. Not only did we hit our ambitious FEC end-of-quarter goal -- we _surpassed_ it.

**I want to say thank you.**

Our campaign relies on small-dollar contributions from grassroots supporters like you who believe in our fight for social and economic justice. Every dollar we raise fuels our movement for change, and it means more funds on hand to defend our vulnerable majority in the House.

Climate justice. Policing reform. Voting rights. Affordable housing. These important fights are all on the docket this upcoming quarter, and House Republicans are going to fight us every step of the way. I need you to stick with me as we move forward, friend.

No movement is made possible by one single person. Its strength lies with the people who support it. Hitting our fundraising goal puts us in a strong position for the second half of the year, and we need to keep our foot on the gas.

I know we can secure even more victories for working people if we keep working together.

Onward,

Karen

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/X1AT-9Mz38XiwZPjyQdg8a4siLKQt38ge7aCetn5IKY=/OXrC4kwWJxGBhr5zHCaBTf3jIoUe45iMhUuN56BrlWc=?gpsid=39_132_19594&refcode=em21_210701_eoqty_engg_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210701_eoqty_engg_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)
---

Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
---

Bass for Congress
918 Pennsylvania Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **- ****July 2, 2021-** **** **\- Banks, Spartz, INGOP Voted to Defund the Police -** As you are visiting family, having a BBQ with your neighbors, and enjoying the holiday weekend, Indiana Democrats are here to equip you with information to expose Republicans’ hypocrisy and misinformation about a longstanding attack they’ve made against Democrats. At the start of the week, Congressman Jim Banks was rightfully called out on Fox News Sunday for voting to defund law enforcement. Banks and every single Republican in Indiana’s Congressional delegation voted “no” on the American Rescue Plan, which is delivering over $350 billion to law enforcement agencies across the country. Further, the Rescue Plan is providing some of Indiana’s first responders - including police officers in Noblesville - a bonus for their heroic work to protect Hoosiers during the pandemic. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz said “no” to these bonuses for officers in her district. Democrats, it’s become clear Indiana Republicans have lost their identity and would rather promote their extreme partisanship and misinformation than create a brighter future for Hoosier families across Indiana. It’s so evident that after Democrats called out Indiana Republicans for this hypocrisy, they demanded a fact check from the media about their claims. They got an answer:[ four pinocchios. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31795676/293779064/98047644?FFF.07.02.21.=FFF.07.02.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjllOTdmNC02YmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3N2nT30hRDfuWi2bFhAu2GapxXCyGXhXfrTXKBo-c5A=&emci=a9acee5b-69db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0f9e97f4-6bdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535) Here’s a fact: the Indiana Republican Party is not supporting a responsible, common sense agenda and would rather tout misinformation and debunked conspiracies than solve today’s problems facing Hoosier families. But we won’t let them. Indiana Democrats are delivering more for Hoosiers now than Republicans ever did from the last four years, and the American Rescue Plan was just the start. **\- Indiana Democratic Party Concludes American Rescue Plan Tour ****-** This week, the Indiana Democratic Party concluded its American Rescue Plan Tour. Democrats held over 25 events with more than 40 counties celebrating the direct relief the Rescue Plan is bringing to Hoosier families. The Indiana Democratic Party made a promise to show up everywhere possible, and this tour covered _**8 out of 9 congressional districts**_. We’re proud of this accomplishment because we’re beginning to tell the story that when Hoosiers support Democrats, we deliver for families. The tour’s success was accomplished in large part because Democrats across Indiana stepped up and got to work. This includes the more than 40 counties and numerous volunteer staff who coordinated with the INDems through the entire month of June. Also, the Party wants to send a special thank you to just some of our leaders who made the Rescue Plan tour a success: Congressman Frank Mrvan, Jr., Joe Donnelly, John Gregg, Christina Hale, Baron Hill, Jill Long Thompson, Dr. Jennifer McCormick, and some of Indiana’s state and city leaders like Mike Andrade, JD Ford, Phil GiaQuinta, Earl Harris Jr., Tom Henry, Tom McDermott, Jr., Eddie Melton, and Robin Shackleford. Democrats’ work to sell the American Rescue Plan is helping build a better future for Indiana while showing Hoosiers what is possible when partnerships between our state and federal governments join forces to help Indiana build back better into a bright future. This better tomorrow will all be thanks to President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats because we are delivering for Indiana. **\- County Party Summit -** ****_**-Save the date-**_ **Bartholomew County Democratic Party:** [BC Democratic Women at the Columbus Farmer's Market](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31795677/293779065/-1664642187?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A\[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.07.02.21.=FFF.07.02.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjllOTdmNC02YmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3N2nT30hRDfuWi2bFhAu2GapxXCyGXhXfrTXKBo-c5A=&emci=a9acee5b-69db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0f9e97f4-6bdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535), clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | - July 2, 2021- ** \- Banks, Spartz, INGOP Voted to Defund the Police - As you are visiting family, having a BBQ with your neighbors, and enjoying the holiday weekend, Indiana Democrats are here to equip you with information to expose Republicans’ hypocrisy and misinformation about a longstanding attack they’ve made against Democrats. At the start of the week, Congressman Jim Banks was rightfully called out on Fox News Sunday for voting to defund law enforcement. Banks and every single Republican in Indiana’s Congressional delegation voted “no” on the American Rescue Plan, which is delivering over $350 billion to law enforcement agencies across the country. Further, the Rescue Plan is providing some of Indiana’s first responders - including police officers in Noblesville - a bonus for their heroic work to protect Hoosiers during the pandemic. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz said “no” to these bonuses for officers in her district. Democrats, it’s become clear Indiana Republicans have lost their identity and would rather promote their extreme partisanship and misinformation than create a brighter future for Hoosier families across Indiana. It’s so evident that after Democrats called out Indiana Republicans for this hypocrisy, they demanded a fact check from the media about their claims. They got an answer: Here’s a fact: the Indiana Republican Party is not supporting a responsible, common sense agenda and would rather tout misinformation and debunked conspiracies than solve today’s problems facing Hoosier families. But we won’t let them. Indiana Democrats are delivering more for Hoosiers now than Republicans ever did from the last four years, and the American Rescue Plan was just the start. \- Indiana Democratic Party Concludes American Rescue Plan Tour **- This week, the Indiana Democratic Party concluded its American Rescue Plan Tour. Democrats held over 25 events with more than 40 counties celebrating the direct relief the Rescue Plan is bringing to Hoosier families. The Indiana Democratic Party made a promise to show up everywhere possible, and this tour covered 8 out of 9 congressional districts. We’re proud of this accomplishment because we’re beginning to tell the story that when Hoosiers support Democrats, we deliver for families. The tour’s success was accomplished in large part because Democrats across Indiana stepped up and got to work. This includes the more than 40 counties and numerous volunteer staff who coordinated with the INDems through the entire month of June. Also, the Party wants to send a special thank you to just some of our leaders who made the Rescue Plan tour a success: Congressman Frank Mrvan, Jr., Joe Donnelly, John Gregg, Christina Hale, Baron Hill, Jill Long Thompson, Dr. Jennifer McCormick, and some of Indiana’s state and city leaders like Mike Andrade, JD Ford, Phil GiaQuinta, Earl Harris Jr., Tom Henry, Tom McDermott, Jr., Eddie Melton, and Robin Shackleford. Democrats’ work to sell the American Rescue Plan is helping build a better future for Indiana while showing Hoosiers what is possible when partnerships between our state and federal governments join forces to help Indiana build back better into a bright future. This better tomorrow will all be thanks to President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats because we are delivering for Indiana. \- County Party Summit - **-Save the date- Bartholomew County Democratic Party: \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.07.02.21.=FFF.07.02.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjllOTdmNC02YmRiLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3N2nT30hRDfuWi2bFhAu2GapxXCyGXhXfrTXKBo-c5A=&emci=a9acee5b-69db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0f9e97f4-6bdb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535, July 3, 9:00 - 12:30 AM, 123 Washington St, Columbus, IN 47201 Cass County Democratic Party: , July 3, 9:00 - 10:00 AM, Black Dog Coffee, 116 S 6th St, Logansport, IN 46947 Boone County Democratic Party: , July 4, 10:00 - 3:00 PM, Lebanon, IN. body:

---
| | | | |
# [DEMAND TEXAS MUSEUM "UN-CANCEL" BOOK EVENT CANCELLED AFTER RIGHT-WING PRESSURE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc17ce335-85c6-44a9-b75e-e649c83d151c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3392e29-cdd3-472c-b48b-5364dabb4346/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Right-wingers whine about “cancel culture”, but like the fragile snowflakes they are, [they rush to do it themselves](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e916097-1a03-4306-806c-b34e687cf2ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) when their myths are challenged in any way: _“In an ironic move, the Bob Bullock Texas State History Museum today (July 1), with three hours notice, canceled a talk with co-authors of [Forget the Alamo](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f19b073-a7d4-4b0a-9ec3-b0235beddc23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), a new look at the myths and realities of the Texas origin story, after "increased pressure on social media" targeted the museum and its board of high-ranking state officials.”_ ([Source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81eee29e-4ef2-4f10-816d-074476f540c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))

[**Add your name, and send the museum a message: “We condemn your cancellation of the ‘Forget the Alamo’ book event, and call on you to reverse it immediately.”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te07c273e-c18c-447d-8f9a-2e49e34fffd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) (And if you can, consider joining us in [buying a copy](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf87a28f3-749c-4219-a540-ba177ab667c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to show your support)

Your response is requested.

We’re running this campaign because we firmly believe our country deserves a proven leader ready to deliver for their community.
